CARE-KV paper-best (carekv_stored, joint+normalize, cached, SK=2 SV=4 RK=2 RV=2).

KIVI-style same-condition reimplementation. Per-channel K (INT3) + per-token V (INT3). Implemented by monkey-patching apply_rotary_pos_emb to quant-dequant K post-RoPE, and v_proj to quant-dequant V. NOT the official KIVI repo (no custom CUDA kernels).

k_quant_scheme: per-channel (KIVI, scale across tokens), INT3 + CARE-KV residual slots
v_quant_scheme: per-token  (KIVI, scale across channels), INT3 + CARE-KV residual slots
notes: KIVI-style base quant (per-channel K INT3 + per-token V INT3, same-condition reimpl) + CARE-KV residual correction (carekv_stored, joint+normalize, cached, SK=2 SV=4 RK=2 RV=2). K_hat/V_hat held in fp16 side-buffer in this prototype; memory accounting reports KIVI's theoretical bits.
